subject: Gaming
title: Australia's Banning History
description: A quick win: understand Australia's Banning History.

hook.text: Australia banned dozens of games for years because it had no adult game rating. Adults were treated like children.

buildup.text: Without an R18+ rating, any game that exceeded the MA15+ classification was refused classification entirely.

discovery.text: Games like Left 4 Dead 2, Mortal Kombat, and GTA were banned or censored for the Australian market.

twist.text: It took until 2013 for Australia to introduce an R18+ rating. One attorney general had single-handedly blocked it.

climax.text: The story showed how one person's moral stance could override an entire nation's adult entertainment choices.

punchline.text: One person blocked adult ratings for years. A nation was treated like children.

quiz.question: Why were games banned in Australia before 2013?
options: There was no adult R18+ rating—one attorney general blocked it
The government banned all entertainment media
